name: Hot Artichoke Spread
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (14 ounces each) artichoke hearts (water-packed, not marinated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain or use 2 packages (9 ounces each) frozen artichoke hearts, thawed
2. Add 1 drop hot pepper sauce
3. Add 1 small garlic clove, minced
4. Add 1 tsp lemon juice
5. Add 1 cup grated Parmesan cheese
6. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
7. Place all ingredients in a food processor and blend until smooth. If using a blender, stop frequently and scrape sides with a rubber spatula. Ensure blades have stopped before blending just until mixture is smooth.
8. Coat a 1-1/2 quart baking dish with nonstick vegetable spray and pour in the mixture.
9. Bake for 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
10. Serve on party rye bread.
